news.summary: On June 6, 2025, a financial firm based in Los Angeles called IFC Advisors selected the AdvisorVault 17a-4 Managed 365 Service® to ensure compliance with 17a-4 regulations on the Microsoft Cloud. Prior to this decision, IFC was facing compliance issues due to utilizing outdated technology, notably an end-of-life server containing important data. This move signifies a proactive step by IFC Advisors to modernize and adhere to the necessary regulatory standards.
news.headline: IFC Advisors in Los Angeles selects AdvisorVault 17a-4 Managed 365 Service® for compliance on Microsoft Cloud amidst old tech issues.
Expert Predicts Minor Adjustments Predominantly Of A Technical Kind .

news.summary: Casey's General Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ: CASY) is set to unveil its fourth-quarter financial results on June 9 after market close. Analysts are anticipating quarterly earnings to stand around $1.95 per share, a decrease from the previous year's $2.34 per share. Revenue for this quarter is projected to hit $3.95 billion, up from $3.6 billion in the same period the previous year. Keybanc analyst Bradley Thomas, on April 11, initiated coverage on Casey's with an Overweight rating and a price target set at $500. The current annual dividend yield offered by Casey's is at 0.45%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share or $2.00 annually. With the recent interest in Casey's, investors are eyeing potential gains from dividends as well. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Casey's Q4 earnings expected at $1.95/share on revenue of $3.95B. Stock rated Overweight with $500 target price. Annual dividend yield at 0.45%.

news.summary: CERo Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: CERO) in South San Francisco has announced the issuance of additional shares of its Series D Preferred Stock to institutional investors. This move comes after a securities purchase agreement was made on April 22, 2025. The issuance, totaling $8 million, includes $5 million distributed in April 2025 and up to $3 million that may be issued at the discretion of the Investors. The Series D Preferred Stock can be converted into common stock of the Company, as part of their efforts to advance engineered T cell therapeutics.
news.headline: CERo Therapeutics announced $8 million Series D financing round, with $5 million issued previously in April 2025.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the US has dropped to 4.8%, with around 400,000 new jobs added to the economy last month. This marks a significant improvement from the previous month and suggests a positive trend in job growth. Additionally, the report showed that the average hourly earnings for workers have increased by 2.5% from last year, indicating a rise in wages for employees. These numbers reflect a strengthening of the labor market and indicate the potential for continued economic growth in the coming months.
news.headline: Market futures rise with anticipation for US Jobs Report; rebounding ahead of release.
Trump is "not interested" in call with Musk - CNBC Citing White House official.

news.summary: In Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia, the Oyu Tolgoi LLC Board of Directors has given the green light for development work to begin under a different mine plan. Meanwhile, discussions are ongoing with Entrée Resources and the Government of Mongolia regarding the transfer of licenses for mining in the Entrée joint venture zone. Oyu Tolgoi is on track to increase production, with expected output from Panel 0 and Panel 2 in 2025 and 2026. There are no alterations to Rio Tinto's estimated copper production for 2025, which is between 780 to 850kt.
news.headline: Oyu Tolgoi mine to proceed with alternative plan, targeting production from Panel 0 and Panel 2 in 2025 and 2026. Rio Tinto maintains 2025 copper guidance of 780 to 850kt.

news.summary: In Dublin, a resource has unveiled the "Denmark Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database. With more than 25 operational data centers, Denmark boasts about 100 MW in total IT power. Anticipated growth could see capacity soar to 400 MW, quadrupling the current capability. Key players such as atNorth and Prime Data Centers are spearheading expansive projects, while established operators like Digital Realty and STACK Infrastructure maintain prominence in the market.
news.headline: Denmark has 25 active data centers with 100 MW of total IT power; upcoming capacity to reach 400 MW. Leading developers: atNorth, Prime Data Centers. Top operators: Digital Realty, STACK Infrastructure.
$RIO TINTO: NO CHANGE TO RIO TINTO'S 2025 COPPER GUIDANCE OF 780 TO 850KT

news.summary: The addition of a highly experienced industry executive to the Board of Directors enhances the company's strategic position as it progresses toward submitting a Biologics License Application and developing commercial opportunities. This move underscores the company's commitment to growth and marks an important step in its journey towards regulatory approval and commercialization. The new executive brings invaluable expertise and insight to the board, bolstering its leadership with a wealth of knowledge in the industry. This development signifies a key milestone for the company as it aims to navigate the path towards achieving its objectives in the biologics sector.
news.headline: Maha Radhakrishnan, M.D., joins Candel Therapeutics' Board of Directors to aid in commercial development.

news.summary: BETHESDA, Md.--RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE: RLJ) disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter that concluded on June 30, 2025, post-market closure on August 7, 2025. Subsequently, a conference call is scheduled for August 8, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. EST. Interested individuals are advised to join the call about 10 minutes beforehand. To participate, dial (877) 407-3982 or (201) 493-6780 for international attendees.
news.headline: RLJ Lodging Trust to release Q2 2025 earnings on Aug 7; conference call on Aug 8 at 10am ET. Dial (877) 407-3982 to join.

news.summary: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) unveiled Pivot Pointe, a new residential community in Meridian, Idaho. The homes cater to modern living, boasting contemporary kitchens, spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage areas. The two-story floor plans at Pivot Pointe offer up to five bedrooms and three baths. This development is set in the sought-after Meridian area, reinforcing KB Home's reputation as one of the leading U.S. homebuilders, known for its emphasis on strong relationships with customers.
news.headline: KB Home opens Pivot Pointe community in Meridian, Idaho with up to 5 bedrooms and 3 baths, catering to modern lifestyles.

news.summary: In Schaumburg, Illinois, today, nearly 11,000 volunteers from Convergint, a global systems integrator with 220 locations worldwide, dedicated around 60,000 hours of their time for the company’s 24th annual Convergint Social Responsibility Day. This initiative benefited over 174 community organizations and 35 schools in 37 countries globally. Additionally, more than 30 partners from the industry contributed their time and over $639,000 in donations to support this year's efforts.
news.headline: Convergint colleagues volunteered worldwide, helping 174 orgs, 35 schools, and contributing 60,000 hours for $639,000.

news.summary: Luna Atoms, the innovative animated alternative artist, has released her first visual album, The Future, today in London. This 8-track album features a fusion of soulful, human-made music alongside stunning AI-generated visuals. The aim of this project is to create an immersive experience that appeals to both younger and older audiences. The Future is crafted to inspire and bring people together through a vibrant display of emotions and joy. The album combines heartfelt themes with a playful tone, offering a unique journey into a world of connectivity and affection.
news.headline: Luna Atoms releases debut visual album "The Future" today, featuring 8 tracks and AI-generated visuals, creating a unique and inclusive experience.

news.summary: Recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings is the "Italy Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database. Milan is indicated as the frontrunner in Italy's upcoming data center market. Due to its favorable geographical positioning, Italy is increasingly considered an optimal location for data centers. With cities like London, Amsterdam, and Dublin experiencing network saturation, Italy is emerging as a promising hub for data infrastructure. The projected upcoming IT power capacity is substantial, estimated at approximately 2 GW, which is nearly double the existing capacity.
news.headline: Italy's data center market is growing with Milan leading; upcoming IT power capacity is around 2 GW, almost double the current capacity.

news.summary: Effective immediately, Lucky Energy drink has appointed Lou Fabiano as President on June 6, 2025. In this role, Fabiano will report directly to Richard Laver, the Founder and CEO of the company. The decision to bring Fabiano on board aligns with Lucky Energy's strategic objective to establish itself as a prominent player in the energy beverage sector.
news.headline: Lucky Energy names Lou Fabiano as President, aiming to lead in energy drink sector. Richard Laver is Founder and CEO.

news.summary: In Coconut Creek, Florida, on June 6, 2025, Willis Lease Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: WLFC), a key lessor of commercial aircraft engines and global aviation services provider, revealed that its subsidiary, Willis Engine Structured Trust VIII (WEST), has priced $524 million in Series A Fixed Rate Notes and $72 million in Series B Fixed Rate Notes, totaling $596 million in aggregate principal amount. These Notes, slated to close on June 18, 2025, will be backed by WEST’s stake in a collection of 62 aircraft engines and two airframes acquired from WLFC or its affiliates under an asset purchase deal.
news.headline: Willis Lease Finance Corp announces pricing of $596.0 million in fixed rate notes secured by interests in 62 aircraft engines and 2 airframes.

news.summary: In Milwaukee on June 6, 2025, a leading work truck attachments and equipment manufacturer, Douglas Dynamics, Inc. (NYSE: PLOW), revealed that their Board of Directors has given the green light to a quarterly cash dividend of $0.295 per share for the second quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Douglas Dynamics (NYSE: PLOW) declares $0.295 per share quarterly cash dividend for Q2 2025, board approved.

news.summary: In Hampton, New Jersey, on June 6, 2025, Celldex Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that Denice M. Torres has been appointed to the board of directors. This update was shared by the company listed under NASDAQ as CLDX.
news.headline: Celldex Therapeutics appoints Denice Torres to Board of Directors on June 6, 2025. $CLDX (Nasdaq)

news.summary: The current economic objectives of President Donald Trump include achieving a robust labor market and maintaining low interest rates. However, these aims are currently not aligned due to the prevailing economic conditions.
news.headline: Trump wants strong labor market and low rates but they are incompatible. Balancing act not achievable.

news.summary: In a press release dated June 06, 2025, Talkspace (Nasdaq: TALK), a prominent behavioral healthcare firm, revealed that senior management members will partake in forthcoming investor conferences.
news.headline: Talkspace (Nasdaq: TALK) to present at investor conferences in NEW YORK on June 6, 2025.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, in Minneapolis, a collaboration was unveiled between PetVivo Holdings, Inc. and Commonwealth, the ownership group backing prominent racehorses Mage and Country Grammer. PetVivo, an up-and-coming biomedical device company focusing on animal well-being, is joining forces with Commonwealth to advance SPRYNG ® with OsteoCushion ® Technology and Precise PRP™. These cutting-edge solutions aim to enhance joint health and durability. Commonwealth, associated with the winning of the 2023 Kentucky Derby and the 2022 Dubai World Cup, plans to promote these products in elite equine athletes. PetVivo is listed under OTCQB as PETV and OTCPINK as PETVW.
news.headline: PetVivo and Commonwealth collaborate to advance equine wellness in Thoroughbred racing with SPRYNG ® and Precise PRP ™.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) revealed its partnership with Drift Protocol, a top decentralized derivatives exchange on Solana. DeFi Dev Corp. is the inaugural US public company focusing on accumulating and compounding Solana ("SOL"). Drift Protocol, with $1 billion in deposits, stands as a significant player in the Solana network, making this collaboration a strategic move for both entities.
news.headline: DeFi Dev Corp (Nasdaq: DFDV) partners with Drift Protocol, $1B deposits, lists dfdvSOL Liquid Staking Token.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%. The economy also saw a significant increase in job creation with over 250,000 new jobs added last month. This positive trend has led to a boost in consumer confidence, causing an uptick in spending and investment. Additionally, wages have seen a steady rise of 3% over the past year, indicating a healthier economy. Experts predict that this growth is likely to continue in the coming months, further strengthening the country's economic outlook.
news.headline: American Rebel CEO will perform at Bristol Dragway, while American Rebel Light Beer will be available at trackside bar and beer garden.

news.summary: Arcutis is scheduled to showcase five posters at the upcoming 2025 Revolutionizing Atopic Dermatitis (RAD) Conference in Nashville, TN, on June 6-7, 2025.
news.headline: Arcutis to showcase long-term results of ZORYVE cream at 2025 RAD Conference with five posters in Nashville, June 6-7.

news.summary: LGI Homes is excited to introduce Lake Gallagher Estates, a stunning new community in Dover that is now open for prospective buyers. This development offers a range of modern homes and amenities, catering to residents looking for a contemporary lifestyle. Interested individuals should visit the location for more details and to explore the available options.
news.headline: LGI Homes opens Lake Gallagher Estates in Dover, FL, featuring premium homes on expansive lots.

news.summary: A recent report has shown that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, which is the lowest it has been in the past ten years. The report also revealed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs last month, surpassing expectations. Additionally, the average hourly earnings increased by 3.2% from the previous year. Experts believe that these positive trends demonstrate a strengthening labor market and overall economic growth.
news.headline: Entrée Resources halts Oyu Tolgoi Lift 1 Panel 1 underground development temporarily. #mining #OyuTolgoi

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, iGlobal Media USA, a fast-growing digital broadcasting company, revealed its launch of a $500,000 investment initiative towards expanding its cloud-based radio platform nationwide. The company aims to achieve widespread coverage through this funding round.
news.headline: iGlobal Media USA seeks $500,000 investment for expanding digital radio platform nationwide.

news.summary: In London on June 6, 2025, Wirex Pay, a leading stablecoin payment platform, revealed its expansion to Stellar thanks to a significant award from the Stellar Community Fund (SCF). This development will enable Wirex Pay to implement its primary payments framework directly on the Stellar network.
news.headline: Wirex Pay partners with Stellar, aided by top-tier award from SCF, to expand stablecoin solutions, enhancing payment platform.

news.summary: Financial technology company Trumid recently revealed impressive numbers for their fixed income electronic trading platform in May 2025. The platform reported record buy-side engagement, with a notable increase in trade volume and user participation. The company's success was evident through the higher levels of activity, showcasing the growing interest and trust in their services within the financial industry.
news.headline: Trumid reports record buy-side platform engagement in May 2025 with increased trade volume and user participation.

news.summary: Pinewood.AI is set to purchase a majority 51% stake in Lithia, with a new contract ensuring its software will be implemented across all of Lithia's dealerships in the United States and Canada by 2028. The deal, set to finalize on June 6, 2025, marks a significant collaboration between the two companies. Pinewood Technologies Group plc (Pinewood.AI), known for their advanced cloud-based automotive software solutions, will extend its reach dramatically through this agreement, tapping into a broad network of dealerships.
news.headline: Pinewood.AI buying 51% of Lithia's stake; to deploy in US and Canada by 2028. Joint venture deal announced.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, SunCar Technology Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SDA), a top player in cloud-based B2B auto eInsurance and services in China, revealed that its representatives will attend...
news.headline: SunCar (NASDAQ: SDA) to partake in investor conferences. Leader in cloud-based auto services in China.

news.summary: In Tallahassee, Florida, on June 6, 2025, Trulieve Cannabis Corp. (CSE: TRUL) (OTCQX: TCNNF), a prominent cannabis company in the U.S., revealed its upcoming participation in events during June. Specifically, they are set to take part in the Benzinga Cannabis Capital Conference in Chicago.
news.headline: Trulieve Cannabis Corp. to participate in June 2025 event, Benzinga Cannabis Capital Conference in Chicago.

news.summary: Alice Pocklington, APAC EVP, was recently honored in the Markets Media 2025 Women in Finance Asia Awards for her outstanding work in Fintech. Following this recognition, Trading Technologies International, Inc. (TT) achieved a significant win. The awards took place on June 6, 2025, in Chicago and New York. TT is a prominent global provider of capital markets technology solutions.
news.headline: TT® platform by Trading Technologies wins Best Derivatives Trading System award. Alice Pocklington, EVP, receives Best in Fintech award.

news.summary: In June 2025, Khachkar Studios announced the launch of the EMPOW Awards, with a total funding of over $10 million specifically allocated for "Good News" support. The EMPOW Awards will offer  $250,000 in prizes for the inaugural event. Interested individuals can learn more about the awards and their mission through a podcast available at https://khachkarstudios.com/podcast-Empow/.
news.headline: Khachkar Studios launching $10,000 EMPOW Awards, part of $10+ million initiative with $250,000 by 2025. Listen to podcast.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. (AAM), listed under NYSE as AXL, announced its participation in the upcoming Deutsche Bank 2025 Global Auto Industry Conference. The event is set to take place on June 11, with AAM slated to deliver a fireside chat presentation that will be webcasted live at 1:25 p.m. Eastern Time. The company's involvement in this conference presents an opportunity for stakeholders to tune in and gain insights into AAM's strategies and outlook for the future.
news.headline: AAM to present at Deutsche Bank 2025 Conference on June 11, webcast at 1:25 p.m. ET. (Details - AXL NYSE)
